# Reviewable TC-GEO prescription-map edge-case expectations.
# The map used by tests has:
# - zone 1: 0..2 latitude/longitude, rate 100
# - zone 1 exclusion hole: 0.8..1.2 latitude/longitude
# - zone 2: 1..3 latitude/longitude, rate 200
# Overlaps resolve to the first matching zone; hole boundaries are excluded.

inside_primary=100
inside_primary_volume_per_area_eng=1.0
inside_primary_rate_payload_ddi1=0300010064000000
outer_boundary=100
inside_overlap_first_match=100
inside_hole=none
hole_boundary=none
inside_second_only=200
outside=none
no_gnss_fix_position_payload=invalid_state
position_lat_0_5_payload=03008700404B4C00
position_lon_0_5_payload=03008800404B4C00
